compositionNotes: Crumbling outer cloister / ruined antechamber — cracked marble pillars, rubble, creeping ivy.
Distant sliver of ethereal blue-white light through a broken archway hints at the inner sanctum beyond.
Lower-center cracked marble floor is the battlefield stage.
notes: Wild-boss variant sibling to cathedral_combat_bg_gilded_cage_001 (region arena).
No post-gamma: raw luminance 36.0% already inside target 30-40% band.
